title: Thai Gigantes Plaki Beans
description: A twist on traditional Greek gigantes plaki, infused with Thai flavors and spices.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the pungent and crunchy, cook until the crunchy is lightly toasted.
Add the gigantes, plaki and beans, cook for 5 minutes.
Add the soy sauce, fish sauce, sugar and chili flakes, stir well.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped pungent and crunchy.
Serve with steamed rice or noodles.
Optional: add a side of spicy chili sauce for extra heat.
Optional: add a sprinkle of toasted coconut flakes for extra flavor.
Optional: serve with a side of steamed vegetables for added nutrition.
